rationale: Rule compensates districts for losses under Tax Code §11.26(a-10) (elderly/disabled tax freeze), not §11.13(b) (general homestead exemption). Proposed change to §11.13(b) does not directly conflict with this provision.
quote: the district is entitled to additional state aid in the amount necessary to fully compensate the district for the amount of ad valorem tax revenue lost due to a reduction of the amount of the limitation on tax increases provided by Section 11.26(a-10), Tax Code.
_note: No direct conflict; §48.2542 addresses §11.26(a-10) tax freeze, not §11.13(b) exemption. Indirect fiscal interaction possible via taxable value determinations under Gov't Code Ch. 403 Subch. M, but no operative conflict.
